$description: Spotify — vibrant green accent on a deep-black canvas, bold geometric sans, album-art-driven dark immersive UI. Derived from the public Spotify product surface (getdesign.md/spotify). Not an official Spotify design system. MIT.

accent.$description: Spotify green — the primary brand accent, CTA fill, focus.

accent-hover.$description: Spotify green hover — slightly brighter on press / hover.

highlight.$description: Companion bright-green — small inline highlights, badges.

black.$description: Body ink — on Spotify's dark canvas the default text reads near-white. Semantic-name kept; value flipped to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

ink.$description: Pure black — chapter dividers, deepest contrast band beneath the canvas.

graphite.$description: Body strong on dark — emphasized paragraphs, lead text (Spotify's mid-grey).

steel.$description: Muted on dark — sub-headings, breadcrumbs, secondary labels.

silver.$description: Muted soft on dark — captions, fine-print.

fog.$description: Hairline border on dark surfaces — Spotify's elevated card edge.

paper.$description: Elevated card surface — feature cards, content cards above the canvas.

paper-2.$description: Strongest elevated surface — emphasized cards, hover state.

off-white.$description: On-dark text — pure white, used on accent-green fills.

off-white-2.$description: On-dark soft — footer body text, secondary labels.

surface-dark.$description: Code editors, model showcase cards, footer — deepest band.

surface-dark-soft.$description: Code block backgrounds — Spotify's true-black surface.

surface-cream-strong.$description: Strongest band — selected tabs, emphasized bands.

accent-teal.$description: Secondary product accent — Spotify's playlist blue, status dots, terminal indicators.

white.$description: Canvas — Spotify's true-black surface, the brand-defining dark backdrop. Semantic-name kept; value flipped to invert the palette without rewriting layouts.

font-family.$description: Spotify house pairing — Spotify Circular (geometric sans, not freely licensed) with system-sans fallback chain. Mono falls back to JetBrains Mono.

font-weight.$description: Spotify uses 400/500/700/900 — bold geometric sans reads as confident, weight 700 is the workhorse for headlines.

radius.$description: Spotify uses pill / fully rounded for buttons (the iconic green play button), 8px on cards, 16px on hero containers. card defaults to 8.
